title: cyperus × condensatus
intro: Cyperus × condensatus, also known as umbrella palm or umbrella sedge, is a hybrid plant species within the Cyperaceae family, characterized by its unique umbrella-like shape. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus × condensatus include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Cyperus × condensatus can be made by infusing its roots or leaves in water or oil, and it is also used in various traditional remedies, such as teas and poultices.
